# mixpanel_data_group (Resource)

Manages a Mixpanel data group (group analytics key).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_data_group" "accounts" {
  project_id = 1234567

  display_name  = "Accounts"
  property_name = "account_id"

  metadata = {
    is_company_key      = true
    company_key_name    = "account_id"
    company_revenue_key = "mrr"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `display_name` (String)
- `property_name` (String)

### Optional

- `metadata` (Attributes) Optional metadata blob attached to a data group. (see [below](#nestedatt--metadata))
- `project_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number)
- `data_group_id` (String)
- `is_ready` (Boolean)
- `ready_at` (Number)
- `type` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `metadata`

Optional:

- `company_key_name` (String)
- `company_revenue_key` (String)
- `is_company_key` (Boolean)
